name: qa-discovery-agent
description: QA Discovery Agent — a discovery-only tool that safely crawls a running web application and produces an Application Overview, QA Inventory, Business Feature Tree, Hierarchical QA Map, QA Checklist, Discovery Summary, and Manual Review. It never generates test cases, pass/fail verdicts, or risk scores.

scripts.dev: PORT=4000 tsx watch src/server/server.ts & npm --prefix web run dev
scripts.start: npm run web:build && PORT=3000 tsx src/server/server.ts

author: QA Discovery Agent
